heading: Process for adoption
label: 20962 Process for adoption
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15362 of Title 42

children.heading: General requirement for notice and comment
children.label: a General requirement for notice and comment

children.text: Publication of notice of the proposed guidelines in the Federal Register.
An opportunity for public comment on the proposed guidelines.
An opportunity for a public hearing on the record.
Publication of the final guidelines in the Federal Register.

children.heading: Consideration of recommendations of Development Committee; submission of proposed guidelines to Board of Advisors and Standards Board
children.label: b Consideration of recommendations of Development Committee; submission of proposed guidelines to Board of Advisors and Standards Board

children.heading: Consideration of recommendations of Development Committee
children.label: 1 Consideration of recommendations of Development Committee
children.text: In developing the voluntary voting system guidelines and modifications of such guidelines under this section, the Executive Director of the Commission shall take into consideration the recommendations provided by the Technical Guidelines Development Committee under .section 20961 of this title

children.heading: Board of Advisors
children.label: 2 Board of Advisors
children.text: The Executive Director of the Commission shall submit the guidelines proposed to be adopted under this subpart (or any modifications to such guidelines) to the Board of Advisors.

children.heading: Standards Board
children.label: 3 Standards Board
children.text: The Executive Director of the Commission shall submit the guidelines proposed to be adopted under this subpart (or any modifications to such guidelines) to the Executive Board of the Standards Board, which shall review the guidelines (or modifications) and forward its recommendations to the Standards Board.

children.heading: Review
children.label: c Review
children.text: Upon receipt of voluntary voting system guidelines described in subsection (b) (or a modification of such guidelines) from the Executive Director of the Commission, the Board of Advisors and the Standards Board shall each review and submit comments and recommendations regarding the guideline (or modification) to the Commission.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A voluntary voting system guideline described in subsection (b) (or modification of such a guideline) shall not be considered to be finally adopted by the Commission unless the Commission votes to approve the final adoption of the guideline (or modification), taking into consideration the comments and recommendations submitted by the Board of Advisors and the Standards Board under subsection (c).

children.heading: Minimum period for consideration of comments and recommendations
children.label: 2 Minimum period for consideration of comments and recommendations
children.text: The Commission may not vote on the final adoption of a guideline described in subsection (b) (or modification of such a guideline) until the expiration of the 90-day period which begins on the date the Executive Director of the Commission submits the proposed guideline (or modification) to the Board of Advisors and the Standards Board under subsection (b).

children.heading: Special rule for initial set of guidelines
children.label: e Special rule for initial set of guidelines
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this subpart, the most recent set of voting system standards adopted by the Federal Election Commission prior to , shall be deemed to have been adopted by the Commission as of , as the first set of voluntary voting system guidelines adopted under this subpart.October 29, 2002October 29, 2002
